analysis: The current project has a basic HTML structure with CSS and JavaScript files. The theme should focus on black holes with animated objects, slides, and pages. The existing files need to be updated to include cosmic, dark-themed visuals with animations for black hole effects, swirling patterns, and glowing elements. The navigation should be mobile-friendly with a hamburger menu.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the theme is cohesive and visually appealing.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices. Include sections for interactive planets, animated slides, and other black hole-related content.
Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners for navigation and interactive elements.
